goal: Quick Pull result page mirrors Daily (drop the energy radar) + localize the 3-card poster energy radar to Thai
done: (1) js/reading.js renderQuestion: gated buildEnergyPanel on state.spread !== 'quick', so the single-card Quick Pull on-screen result no longer renders the energy-balance radar (matches the existing buildQuestionTakeawayPanel quick-gate; the big card + reading already mirror the Daily result via data-spread-count='1'). (2) share/poster.js: resolveEnergyBalance(energyData, lang) now localizes the interpretation sentence (EN/TH) and the radar axis labels via new ENERGY_AXIS_WORDS / ENERGY_AXIS_LABELS maps (Action->การลงมือทำ, Emotion->อารมณ์, Thinking->ความคิด, Stability->ความมั่นคง); moved the energy computation below the single-pull early-return so it only runs for the 3-card Story spread. Resolves the energy-radar half of the EN-only TH parity gap (eyebrow half fixed in the prior patch).
verified: Poster: harness render (chrome-devtools MCP, question-harness-th.html, 1080x1920) — 3-card radar axis labels + interpretation now render in Thai; EN path byte-identical (same literals). Result-page gate is logic-only (mirrors the takeaway-panel quick-gate) — NOT browser-verified (the on-screen result page is manual QA), needs an on-device pass to confirm the radar is gone on Quick Pull and present on the 3-card Story result.
